This clinical guidance will be reviewed and updated as pneumococcal disease epidemiology evolves. 
Abbreviations: IPD = invasive pneumococcal disease; PCV = pneumococcal conjugate vaccine; PCV13 = 13-valent PCV; PCV15 = 15-valent PCV; PCV20 = 20-valent PCV; PCV21 = 21-valent PCV; PPSV23 = 23-valent pneumococcal polysaccharide vaccine.
